output.answer: This PDF, "Email AI Extraction Agent — Complete Technical Guide," outlines the creation of an AI agent using Claude, Anthropic API, and JavaScript for extracting information from emails. It details the structure of the system prompt, which includes a role declaration, task instructions, output format lock, schema definition, and a hallucination guard. The document also provides JavaScript code for rendering the extracted results and for the core API call function that sends emails to Claude for processing. The extracted information is returned as a JSON object with fields such as subject, sender, recipients, date, urgency, a 2-3 sentence summary, key headings, major points, action items, links, and important text.
The project name is Prometheus AI.

MVP (Minimum Viable Product) features are the core functionalities that allow a product to be launched with a short development cycle, using existing technologies. For Prometheus AI, the MVP features include:

*   Suspicious email/link submission
*   Sandbox-based execution
*   AiTM (Adversary-in-The-Middle) and BEC (Business Email Compromise) pattern detection
*   Attack propagation simulation
*   Risk dashboard and alert generation

MVP, or Minimum Viable Product, refers to a version of a new product that has just enough features to satisfy early customers and provide feedback for future product development. In the context of the document, the proposed MVP for Prometheus AI is achievable within a short development cycle using existing technologies and cloud-based AI services. Its features include suspicious email/link submission, sandbox-based execution, AiTM and BEC pattern detection, attack propagation simulation, and risk dashboard and alert generation, without requiring real banking integration at this stage.
